title: Handlers return raw exception text to clients
evidence: app.py:89-90, 109-110, 124-125, 168-169, 186-187 — every handler's except returns jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500
suggestion: Log the exception server-side and return a generic 500 message to avoid leaking internal details

title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
evidence: run dir contains only app.py, test_app.py, README.md; README says 'pip install flask' but no pinned manifest and pytest is undeclared
suggestion: Add a requirements.txt pinning flask and pytest for reproducible setup

title: year/isbn accepted without type validation
evidence: app.py:69-70,82 — year/isbn are passed straight to the INSERT with no type or format checks
suggestion: Optionally validate that year is an integer and isbn matches an ISBN format (beyond spec; title/author validation is present and correct)
